backend.changelog: Generate now automatically switches SolidWorks to the BOM's tenant when SolidWorks is open on a different 3DEXPERIENCE platform (closes documents that have no unsaved changes + reopens SolidWorks on the correct tenant), instead of asking you to close SolidWorks manually. Documents with unsaved changes still prompt you to save + close first.

cadBridge.changelog: Diagnostic timing instrumentation: the Generate timing summary now splits the setup phase into 'foreign-doc cleanup' vs 'BOM-root open/activate' so large-assembly launch time can be attributed. No change to generation behaviour.
